inputs.label: Effective Mass Ratio (m*/m₀)
inputs.businessContext: Particle effective mass relative to free electron mass (m₀ = 9.1093837e-31 kg). For electron, use 1.0; for hole, use appropriate value.

inputs.label: Barrier Height (V)
inputs.businessContext: Potential barrier height in electronvolts. Must be greater than particle energy for tunneling to occur classically.

inputs.label: Particle Energy (E)
inputs.businessContext: Energy of the incident particle. Must be less than barrier height for meaningful tunneling probability.

inputs.label: Barrier Width (d)
inputs.businessContext: Width of the potential barrier in nanometers. Typical nanoscale dimensions.
